# em.m_step_pi { #tslai.em.m_step_pi }

```python
tslai.em.m_step_pi(S_root)
```

Closed-form root-frequency MLE: ``π = S_root / Σ S_root`` (CLAUDE.md §3.4).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**S_root**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total expected root-state mass (span-weighted, pooled over roots).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) numpy.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The fitted root frequencies ``π``; uniform if ``S_root`` sums to ``<= 0``.
